response.justification: Exceptional candidate significantly exceeding the 6+ years requirement with 15+ years of progressive full-stack experience. Currently a Staff Engineer with direct experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB, and AI agent infrastructure—all core requirements. Strong engineering practices (TDD, pair programming) and recent relevant work at Optilyz and re:cinq. Primary concern is lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright, though testing and framework adoption experience is evident throughout career.
strengths: Currently Staff Engineer with 15+ years full-stack experience, significantly exceeding seniority requirements
Recent direct experience with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB) and current AI agent infrastructure work
Strong engineering fundamentals demonstrated through TDD adoption, architectural contributions, and progressive senior roles
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js despite extensive Node.js backend expertise; framework-specific knowledge needs verification
Missing Vitest and Playwright in listed skills; testing framework stack should be clarified in interview
Java/Kotlin experience is dated (last mentioned 2018); current proficiency with secondary backend languages unclear
